phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la spiaggia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee doh-VEH lah SPAH-djah pehr fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Down the stairs, towards the sea.
responses.phonetic: JEE-ù PEHR LEH SKAH-leh VEHR-soh EEL MAH-reh
responses.local: Giù per le scale, verso il mare.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove posso prendere una mappa, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh POS-soh PREN-deh-reh OO-nah MAP-pah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask how many steps there are in Positano
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanti gradini ci sono a Positano?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-tee grah-DEE-nee chee SOH-noh ah poh-zee-TAH-noh?
phrases.cultural_note: Positano is built on a steep hillside — there are an estimated 1,500 steps connecting its different levels.

responses.english: Estimated around 1,500, depending on the route.
responses.phonetic: see STEE-mah CHEER-kah MEEL-leh-CHEEN-kweh-CHEN-toh, dee-PEN-deh dal per-KOR-soh.
responses.local: Si stima circa millecinquecento, dipende dal percorso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which steps lead to the ferry port
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quali scale portano al porto dei traghetti?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-lee SKAH-leh por-TAH-noh al POR-toh day trah-GET-tee?

responses.english: Go down Via dei Mulini to the pier.
responses.phonetic: SHEN-dah per VEE-ah day moo-LEE-nee FEE-noh al MOH-loh.
responses.local: Scenda per Via dei Mulini fino al Molo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a local bus that avoids the steps
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un autobus locale per evitare le scale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon ow-toh-BOOS loh-KAH-leh per eh-vee-TAH-reh leh SKAH-leh?

responses.english: Yes, the orange internal bus between the church and the port.
responses.phonetic: see, leen-TER-noh boos ah-RAN-choh-neh trah lah KYEH-zah eh eel POR-toh.
responses.local: Sì, l'interno bus arancione tra la Chiesa e il porto.
